description: Network and communication corrections. Recipient verification, rate limiting, outbound safety.

corrections.what_went_wrong: Sent a message/email/request to the wrong recipient or endpoint
corrections.correct_approach: Always verify the recipient, URL, or endpoint before sending. Display it to the user for confirmation on first use.
corrections.detection: Any outbound communication — email, API call, webhook, chat message

corrections.what_went_wrong: Made API calls in a loop without rate limiting or bounds
corrections.correct_approach: Add delays between API calls. Set a maximum iteration count. Check response codes before continuing.
corrections.detection: Loops containing API calls or network requests
